name: Editor.js
when_to_use: 需要把大纲或共创文档编辑成可直接交给 AI 的 block JSON 时用它而非手写 contenteditable,因为原生在 block 语义、工具栏与稳定序列化上失败;非做分页排版、多人同步或任意 HTML 富文本。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成 textarea/contenteditable,做不到 block 级编辑、工具状态与干净的结构化 JSON 输出;Editor.js 将运行时编辑结果稳定收敛为有序 blocks。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to edit an outline or collaboratively authored document into block JSON that can be passed directly to AI instead of hand-writing contenteditable. Native implementations fail on block semantics, toolbars, and stable serialization. It is not for paginated layout, multiplayer synchronization, or arbitrary HTML rich text.
en.why_valuable: AI can only generate a textarea/contenteditable by default; it cannot provide block-level editing, tool state, and clean structured JSON output. Editor.js reliably converges runtime edits into ordered blocks.

data_in.note: The input is a trimmed Editor.js OutputData shape plus a read-only switch. Core includes only paragraph; every other type requires a Block Tool with the same name to be registered in the constructor's tools.

blocks.id?: string - generated by Editor.js when omitted
blocks.type: string - core directly supports 'paragraph'; every other value requires a tool with the same name
blocks.data: object - defined by the tool corresponding to type; paragraph is exactly {text:string}, and text may contain inline markup allowed by that tool

schema.time?: number - save timestamp (ms), omitted by default
schema.version?: string - Editor.js version that produced the document, omitted by default
schema.readOnly?: boolean - whether the editor is read-only, default false

data_in.note: 输入是 Editor.js OutputData 的裁剪版并附只读开关;核心只内置 paragraph,其他 type 必须在构造参数 tools 中注册同名 Block Tool。

blocks.id?: string —— 省略时由 Editor.js 生成
blocks.type: string —— 核心可直接吃 'paragraph';其他值须配套同名 tool
blocks.data: object —— 由 type 对应的 tool 定义;paragraph 精确为 {text:string},text 可含该 tool 允许的行内标记

schema.time?: number —— 保存时间戳(ms),默认省略
schema.version?: string —— 产出该文档的 Editor.js 版本,默认省略
schema.readOnly?: boolean —— 是否只读,默认 false

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):使用可用的 /dist/editorjs.mjs 入口,new EditorJS({holder,data,readOnly}) 后等待 isReady;根 +esm 路径不可用。

example._why: block 文档属于高歧义编辑器输入,给最小合法 document 防止把 HTML 字符串直接塞给构造器。

peer.note: heading/list/image 等 block 不随核心包提供,须另引对应 @editorjs/* tool 并写入构造参数 tools;本条只保证核心 paragraph 路径。

uplink.widget: 由消费 AI 自己在保存按钮中 await editor.save(),再把所得 OutputData 放入 sendPrompt 文案。
uplink.codex: 由消费 AI 自己在保存按钮中 await editor.save(),再用 sendFollowUpMessage 回传 OutputData。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;把 await editor.save() 的结果下载为 .json 作为兜底。

carriers.widget: conditional:需按 boot 将 Editor.js 动态注入 document.head 的新增 style 搬入 shadow;未接 tools 时仅 paragraph
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe + 包内 ESM 入口;无需 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: editorjs.mjs grep: `createElement('style')` x3 + `document.head` x4 → injects CSS into head (entry's widget boot migrates new head <style> into shadow via before/after diff — handled). `.body.appendChild` x3 → appends utility elements to document.body (NOT handled by boot's shadow migration; may escape shadow, though firing in paragraph-only path unconfirmed). `document.addEventListener('keydown')` + `window.addEventListener('scroll')`, with matching removeEventListener('keydown' x2,'scroll') + destroy() → global listeners exist but are cleaned up on destroy. Entry's 'conditional' marking is right; the body.appendChild footprint is an extra caveat beyond what boot documents.
